subcodes.first_line: O thou bird that soarest in My heaven and gazeth toward Mine horizon! Hearken unto My testimony: There is none other God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر فی هوائی و الناظر الی افقی اسمع شهادتی انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah
